name: 加利尔AR | 彩虹勺
descriptionEn: A less expensive option among the terrorist-exclusive assault rifles, the Galil AR is a serviceable weapon in medium to long-range combat. The rainbow spoon effect is achieved by heating the painted weapon to very high temperatures. By using this method the number of unique finishes is almost infinite. Infinite possibilities
descriptionZh: 在T专用的突击步枪中，这把武器是较为便宜的选择，加利尔AR是一把中远距离作战的耐用武器。 彩虹勺效应是通过将涂漆的武器加热至超高温来实现的。使用这种方法可以创作出无数独一无二的皮肤。 无限的可能性
